name: create_user
description: Create a new user account in your Clerk application. You can provide an email address, phone number, username, and/or password. You can also set metadata and skip email/phone verification if needed. The user will be created immediately and can sign in with the provided credentials.

parameters.name: email_address
parameters.description: Array of email addresses for the user. At least one identifier (email, phone, or username) is required depending on your Clerk instance settings.

parameters.name: phone_number
parameters.description: Array of phone numbers in E.164 format (e.g., '+15551234567').

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: A unique username for the user.

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: The user's password. Must meet your instance's password requirements.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: An external ID for the user, useful for mapping to your own database.

parameters.name: public_metadata
parameters.description: Metadata visible to both frontend and backend. Use for non-sensitive user attributes like roles or preferences.

parameters.name: private_metadata
parameters.description: Metadata visible only to the backend. Use for sensitive data like internal IDs or billing references.

parameters.name: skip_password_checks
parameters.description: If true, skip password complexity validation. Useful for migrations.

parameters.name: skip_password_requirement
parameters.description: If true, create the user without a password. The user can set one later or use OAuth.
